raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "findings": [{"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "memory/atlas/company-state.md", "issue": "No press narrative ready for VOLAURA launch", "recommended_fix": "Create a press narrative and distribute to relevant media outlets"}, {"severity": "P2", "file_or_area": "AZ media landscape", "issue": "No established relationships with key media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az)", "recommended_fix": "Establish relationships with key media outlets and pitch VOLAURA story"}, {"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "GITA grant application", "issue": "Application material not ready for May 27 deadline", "recommended_fix": "Prepare and submit GITA grant application by May 27 deadline"}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "Startup competition pipeline", "issue": "No established pipeline for Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, AzInTelecom competitions", "recommended_fix": "Establish a pipeline for startup competitions and prepare submissions"}, {"severity": "P2", "file_or_area": "Founder visibility", "issue": "CEO's LinkedIn presence not building toward launch", "recommended_fix": "Improve CEO's LinkedIn presence and build toward launch"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: No press narrative ready for VOLAURA launch
findings.recommended_fix: Create a press narrative and distribute to relevant media outlets

findings.issue: No established relationships with key media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az)
findings.recommended_fix: Establish relationships with key media outlets and pitch VOLAURA story

findings.issue: Application material not ready for May 27 deadline
findings.recommended_fix: Prepare and submit GITA grant application by May 27 deadline

findings.issue: No established pipeline for Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, AzInTelecom competitions
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a pipeline for startup competitions and prepare submissions

findings.issue: CEO's LinkedIn presence not building toward launch
findings.recommended_fix: Improve CEO's LinkedIn presence and build toward launch
